_description: Cross-agent findings bus. feedback-loop-agent writes here weekly. signal-agent and orchestrator read at startup to adjust behaviour. Never delete entries — mark expired via expires_at. Add new findings only.

_schema.finding_type: signal_accuracy | elo_validity | category_performance | tier_performance | strategy_performance | pre_resolution_accuracy
_schema.confidence: HIGH (>=20 samples) | MEDIUM (10-19 samples) | LOW (<10 samples, note limitations)
_schema.sample_size: number of resolved markets this finding is based on
_schema.summary: one sentence plain English — what did we learn

detail.baseline: what we expected or what random would give
detail.weeks_observed: how many weeks of data supports this

_schema.actionable: true if signal-agent or orchestrator should change behaviour
_schema.expires_at: ISO8601 — 90 days from generated_at, after which finding may be removed

findings.summary: Pre-resolution intelligence baseline established — first resolution batch resolved April 2026
findings.action_recommendation: No action yet — await first resolution batch. feedback-loop-agent to update after April 1 2026.

signals_in_batch.market: Russia x Ukraine ceasefire by March 31 2026
Trump out as President by March 31
Will Anthropic have the best AI model at the end of March 2026
Will xAI have the best AI model at the end of March 2026

findings.summary: First pre-resolution signal batch: 2/4 correct (50%) — at baseline, below the 60% Phase 5 gate threshold. Small sample, inconclusive.
findings.action_recommendation: Continue collecting. Minimum 10 resolved markets required before drawing conclusions. Signal 1 (Russia/Ukraine at 93% smart money) was a significant miss — watch for overconfidence in geopolitical consensus signals.

findings.summary: Bidirectional holders are a documented structural feature of Polymarket — liquidity providers simultaneously hold YES and NO positions to capture spread, not to express directional views. Must be filtered before any trader counts as a directional signal.

detail.value: unknown — requires quantification in future runs

findings.action_recommendation: signal-agent must exclude any trader holding both YES and NO capital in the same market from directional signal counts. Only traders with zero opposing capital qualify as genuine directional signals. This filter should be applied before ELO convergence counting. External sources confirm LPs are a significant fraction of high-volume traders on Polymarket (ChainCatcher 2025 analysis, Polymarket official documentation).

findings.summary: 1 strategy/strategies overdue for revalidation: STR-001 — Elite Convergence Signal
findings.action_recommendation: Revalidation signals written to signals.json — backtest-agent to action
findings.expiry_reason: STR-001 validated and SUSPENDED 2026-04-27 by backtest-agent. 56.1% accuracy, structural LP contamination flaw. No further revalidation needed.

findings.summary: RQ3.2 preliminary: INCONCLUSIVE — n=4 qualifying markets after clean filters, below 10-market minimum. Legendary traders cluster within 5-10pp of market price on filtered markets, providing insufficient divergence for meaningful testing. Methodology may be testing wrong signal.

detail.methodology_note: Tests aggregate legendary consensus vs market price. May be measuring post-information-incorporation rather than predictive lead. Directional single-trader signals (zero opposing hedge) may be more appropriate test — see RQ2.2.

findings.action_recommendation: Do not trigger stop condition. Reframe RQ3.2 as RQ2.2 (entry timing advantage for directional legendary traders). Rerun when more resolved filtered markets available — need minimum 10 markets with 2+ directional legendary traders and 5pp+ divergence. Current constraint: only 22 markets have 2+ legendary traders after filtering.

findings.summary: RQ2.2 preliminary: YES positions at 95% directional threshold show 75% positive price movement within 7 days — above 60% pass criterion. NO positions show 0% at all thresholds. Average movement near-zero across all configurations. INCONCLUSIVE — magnitude criterion not met, NO signal broken, n=13 too thin.

detail.key_finding: YES positions at 95% threshold: 75% positive movement. NO positions: 0% across all thresholds — structural weakness, 7-day window likely too short for NO timing.
detail.next_test: Extend post-entry window to 14 and 30 days — magnitude may require more time

findings.action_recommendation: Signal-agent should use 95% directional threshold for YES positions only. NO positions need separate methodology — possibly measure over 14-30 day window rather than 7 days. Rerun RQ2.2 with extended windows before treating NO signals as actionable.

findings.summary: RQ1.1 rerun with point-in-time ELO (elo_period1_cutoff): INCONCLUSIVE — n=16, below 30-trader minimum. r=+0.175 near zero, statistically indistinguishable from noise. Previous run used retrospective ELO giving r=-0.194 — direction flip confirms point-in-time fix was necessary. Root constraint: Period 2 only 25 days old, only 47 traders have any P2 activity.

detail.fix_applied: elo_period1_cutoff used instead of comprehensive_elo — direction flip validates fix was necessary

findings.action_recommendation: Rerun after 2026-06-01 when Period 2 will have ~60 days of resolved markets and significantly more qualifying traders. Do not trigger stop condition — n=16 is a timing constraint not a signal failure. The near-zero correlation with clean data is inconclusive, not a fail.

findings.summary: QUALIFIED tier consensus accuracy: 82% over 67 non-sports markets
findings.action_recommendation: Invalidated — use 2026-05-07-ELO-QUALIFIED-002 for authoritative clean-pool result
findings.invalidation_reason: Computed against contaminated research pool: research_excluded=0 matched 746 traders but only 493 meet resolved_trades_count>=20 (253 thin-sample traders included). Run 5 clean-pool revalidation yields 63.16% accuracy (n=57). See 2026-05-07-ELO-QUALIFIED-002.

findings.summary: 1 strategy/strategies overdue for revalidation: STR-002 — Pre-Resolution Intelligence
findings.action_recommendation: Revalidation signals written to signals.json — backtest-agent to action

findings.summary: QUALIFIED tier (ELO>=1200) consensus accuracy: 63.16% on clean 493-trader pool (n=57 markets) — above 60% Phase 5 gate threshold, confirms edge persists on clean data

detail.pool_note: Clean pool — LP_ARTIFACT and ARB_BOT excluded. Filters: research_excluded=0 AND resolved_trades_count>=20. Previous run 4 result (82%, n=67) was on contaminated pool (746 matched research_excluded=0 but 253 lacked resolved_trades_count>=20).
detail.vs_run4: 82.09% contaminated (n=67) to 63.16% clean (n=57) — ~19pp drop attributable to bot and thin-trader exclusion

findings.action_recommendation: QUALIFIED tier consensus accuracy confirmed above 60% Phase 5 gate on clean pool. Signal-agent should continue using QUALIFIED tier consensus. Apply category-level weighting: Geopolitics+Unknown signals carry 91% accuracy vs Elections 47% (below chance). Phase 5 feedback-loop gate criterion now met (run 5 complete, 4+ required).

findings.summary: Elections category: QUALIFIED tier consensus accuracy 46.7% (n=15) — below chance on clean pool, providing negative alpha
findings.action_recommendation: Signal-agent should apply skepticism flag to Elections category signals. QUALIFIED consensus in Elections performs below random chance (46.7% vs 50% baseline). Do not trade Elections signals without independent confirmation. Quant-research-agent should pre-register hypothesis to investigate Elections category dynamics before running analysis.

findings.summary: Geopolitics category: QUALIFIED tier consensus accuracy 92.3% (n=13) — strongest category signal, far above 60% threshold on clean pool
findings.action_recommendation: Signal-agent should prioritise Geopolitics category signals — 92.3% accuracy far exceeds the 60% gate threshold. Combined Geopolitics+Unknown accuracy is 91.3% (n=23). This is where QUALIFIED tier consensus has the most reliable edge. Upgrade Geopolitics signals to HIGH confidence tier when n grows to 20+.

findings.summary: Signal accuracy: 1/1 resolved signals correct (100%) — n=1 insufficient for conclusions, still accumulating
findings.action_recommendation: Await 9 more signal resolutions before drawing accuracy conclusions. One resolved signal (Ramaswamy NO — validated correct 2026-05-02) is insufficient for statistical claims.

findings.summary: RQ2.2 extended window: BOTH YES and NO directional positions at 95% threshold pass 60% criterion using eventual resolution proxy (YES 61.1% n=18, NO 77.8% n=9). At 80% threshold + 30d strict window: YES 64.3% n=42, NO 60.0% n=10 — BOTH PASS. April 26 7d asymmetry (YES 75%, NO 0%) was a window-length artifact. STR-003 validated for EXPERIMENTAL at 95% threshold.

detail.methodology_note: Two methodologies used. Primary: eventual resolution (market resolved in direction of position, no window restriction). Secondary: resolution-within-window (market resolved within N days of entry). Positions deduplicated by (trader_address, market_title) — 489 by market_id reduced to 487 by title (2 genuine duplicates). Pool: 143 legendary traders (ELO>2175, research_excluded=0, resolved_trades_count>=20, bot_type IS NULL). Resolved yes/no markets only, trade_gap_flag excluded.

task1_baseline_reproduction.note: April 26 baseline (n=13, YES 75%, NO 0% at 95% 7d) could not be reproduced with current clean pool. The April 26 run used a pre-propagation pool (~6,829 traders). With the current 493-trader clean pool: minimum time from entry to resolution is 3.3 days; no YES positions have markets resolving within 7d of entry. Confirmed: 7d window is too short for this analysis.
task1_baseline_reproduction.verdict: 7d window too short — confirms April 26 diagnosis

resolution_within_window.description: Markets that resolved within N days of trader's first entry
resolution_within_window.key_finding_80pct_30d: BOTH YES and NO pass at 80% threshold + 30d window. YES concentration note: 24/42 YES observations come from 2 markets (Zelenskyy 12/12 correct, Haley-Jan 12/0 correct) — partially offsetting. 10 unique markets in YES set.

eventual_resolution.description: Did the market eventually resolve in the direction of the position? (no window restriction — authoritative proxy for prediction market outcome)

detail.str003_validation_verdict: PASS — recommend EXPERIMENTAL status at 95% threshold. Primary evidence: eventual resolution YES 61.1% (n=18, 8 unique markets), NO 77.8% (n=9, 6 unique markets) — both above 60% with n>=5. Secondary evidence: 80% threshold + 30d strict window also passes both directions. NO signals are more reliable than YES at 95% (77.8% vs 61.1%). YES needs monitoring as n grows.
detail.key_insight: The April 26 asymmetry (YES 75%, NO 0%) was a window artifact — the 7d window captured only 1 NO position. With extended windows and more resolved data, NO positions at 95% outperform YES positions. The signal is valid for both directions.

findings.action_recommendation: Advance STR-003 to EXPERIMENTAL status at 95% directional threshold. Both YES and NO validated above 60% criterion using eventual resolution proxy. Update strategy-registry.md: PENDING_REVIEW -> EXPERIMENTAL. Add note on YES/NO asymmetry (NO more reliable at 95%). Signal-agent should treat both directions as valid STR-003 signals. Revalidation trigger: run again after 10 more markets resolve (target n=28 YES, n=19 NO at 95% threshold).

findings.summary: 2 data integrity gates overdue for monthly rerun: RQ0.1 (Wash Trading) and RQ0.2 (Bot Detection) — 39 days since last run (2026-03-29)
findings.action_recommendation: Oscar to run RQ0.1 (scripts/wash_trade_audit.py) and RQ0.2 (scripts/bot_detection.py) on first-repo. Total traders grew from 53,140 (March baseline) to 93,331 — new traders may include wash patterns or bots not yet detected. Research pool integrity depends on these gates passing. Revalidation signals written to signals.json.

findings.investigation_note: The 1 resolved signal (STR-004 ceasefire YES, outcome: NO) may be a market confusion artifact. DB investigation 2026-05-11: condition_id 0x7b629fc0b14bece5d568e748f7a8c7c472f90833e9a00c3d4cc3c49e267f194c confirmed as 'Russia x Ukraine ceasefire by Q2 2026?' — resolved=1, winning_outcome=No, end_date=2026-01-23. This is the SAME condition_id stored in the STR-004 signal payload. HOWEVER: a separate DB record 'Russia x Ukraine ceasefire by June 30, 2026?' resolved YES (no condition_id stored). The STR-004 signal noted the actual intended market was the June 30 2026 founding case (confirmed via Polymarket API) but stored market_id 0x7b629fc0... which maps to the Q2 market that resolved early. If the wrong condition_id was stored in the signal payload, the true founding case outcome may be YES (ceasefire DID occur by June 30). Oscar must verify whether 0x7b629fc0... is the correct condition_id for the intended STR-004 founding case before any accuracy calculation is made against this signal.

findings.summary: STR-004 founding case resolved NO — legendary aggregate (55.7% YES, 8 traders, $1.74M) was incorrect vs crowd (7% YES). n=1 insufficient for conclusions. Strategy remains HYPOTHESIS.

detail.stop_criterion: requires n=10 with accuracy<50% to abandon
detail.discrepancy_note: Possible market confusion — separate June 30 market may have resolved YES. Pending Gamma API investigation.

findings.action_recommendation: Continue accumulating STR-004 signals. Do not abandon on n=1. Investigate Gamma API to resolve market identity discrepancy before next founding case assessment.
